name: Can I get benefits for mental health issues from stressful job in Bountiful?

mainEntity.name: Can I get benefits for mental health issues from stressful job in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.description: Rarely, unless tied to physical exposure or recognized occupational disease; pure stress often idiopathic.[2] Utah requires work causation beyond personal factors.[3] Key factors: physical trigger proof, not just stress. Get psych eval linking to job; low success without.[2] Focus on documented exposures.
